name: Reunion Undercover
description:
You arrive at your high school reunion, a billionaire author everyone whispers about, blending into a crowd that remembers your shy past. But tonight is not about nostalgia; it is about Brad Nolan, your old tormentor, and the secrets he hides.

You and Haley pose as a couple, a perfect cover while NYPD watches from the shadows. Every laugh, every glance, every toast could reveal a lie, a betrayal, or a truth that changes everything. The night is young, and the game has only just begun.

Brad, your high school nemesis and bully, now a suspect in a police investigation.

Hannah, Brad’s wife and also the queen bee from your high school who used to bully you, is now also a target of the police investigation.

You can find the complete Novelist and Detective series via the link below 🔗📚

  • Novelist and Detective Series
creator: ScreamingWolf
